Title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
Preconditions: User logged in, product available
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Verify Add to Cart button visible
3. Click Add to Cart
4. Verify success notification
Expected Result:
- Product added to cart
- Cart count increments
- Success message shown

Title: Add to Cart - From Category List
Preconditions: User logged in, category page open
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Hover over product card
3. Click quick add button
4. Verify cart updates
Expected Result:
- Can add from listing
- Cart updates immediately
- No page navigation required

Title: Add to Cart - Multiple Quantities
Preconditions: On product detail page
Steps:
1. Set quantity to 5
2. Click Add to Cart
3. View cart
4. Verify quantity is 5
Expected Result:
- Quantity selector works
- Correct quantity added
- Subtotal reflects quantity

Title: Add to Cart - Product Variation
Preconditions: Configurable product available
Steps:
1. Navigate to configurable product
2. Select size: Medium
3. Select color: Blue
4. Add to cart
5. View cart
Expected Result:
- Selected options displayed in cart
- Correct variant SKU
- Price matches selection

Title: View Cart - Display Items
Preconditions: Products in cart
Steps:
1. Click cart icon
2. Verify mini cart shows
3. Click 'View Cart'
4. Verify full cart page
Expected Result:
- Mini cart displays items
- Full cart shows all details
- Images, names, prices correct

Title: Update Quantity - Increase
Preconditions: Product in cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Find quantity input
3. Click + or enter higher number
4. Verify update
Expected Result:
- Quantity increases
- Line total updates
- Cart total updates

Title: Update Quantity - Decrease
Preconditions: Product in cart with qty > 1
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click - on quantity
3. Verify quantity decreases
4. Verify totals update
Expected Result:
- Quantity decreases
- Cannot go below 1
- Totals recalculate

Title: Update Quantity - Direct Input
Preconditions: Product in cart
Steps:
1. Click quantity field
2. Clear and type '10'
3. Press Enter or blur
4. Verify update
Expected Result:
- Direct input accepted
- Quantity updates
- Validates against stock

Title: Remove Item - Single Product
Preconditions: Product in cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click remove/X button on item
3. Confirm if prompted
4. Verify item removed
Expected Result:
- Item removed from cart
- Cart count decrements
- Totals update

Title: Remove Item - Last Item
Preconditions: Only one item in cart
Steps:
1. Remove the only item
2. Verify empty cart state
3. Verify empty cart message
Expected Result:
- Cart becomes empty
- Empty state message shown
- Continue shopping link

Title: Clear Cart - All Items
Preconditions: Multiple items in cart
Steps:
1. Click 'Clear Cart' button
2. Confirm action in dialog
3. Verify all items removed
Expected Result:
- Confirmation dialog appears
- All items removed
- Empty cart state shown

Title: Save for Later - Move Item
Preconditions: Product in cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Save for Later' on item
3. Verify item moves to saved list
4. Verify removed from cart
Expected Result:
- Item moves to saved section
- No longer in cart total
- Can move back to cart

Title: Save for Later - Move Back
Preconditions: Item in saved for later list
Steps:
1. View saved for later section
2. Click 'Move to Cart'
3. Verify item returns to cart
Expected Result:
- Item added back to cart
- Removed from saved list
- Totals update

Title: Apply Coupon - Valid Code
Preconditions: Valid coupon exists in system
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Enter valid coupon code
3. Click Apply
4. Verify discount applied
Expected Result:
- Coupon accepted
- Discount shown
- Total reduced

Title: Apply Coupon - Invalid Code
Preconditions: N/A
Steps:
1. Enter invalid coupon 'FAKECODE'
2. Click Apply
3. Verify error message
Expected Result:
- Error: Invalid coupon
- No discount applied
- Clear error message

Title: Cart Calculations - Subtotal
Preconditions: Multiple items in cart
Steps:
1. View cart
2. Calculate expected subtotal manually
3. Compare to displayed subtotal
Expected Result:
- Subtotal = sum of line totals
- Accurate to cent
- Updates on changes

Title: Cart Calculations - Tax
Preconditions: Taxable items in cart, tax configured
Steps:
1. View cart with items
2. Verify tax line displayed
3. Verify tax calculation
Expected Result:
- Tax calculated correctly
- Based on shipping address
- Rate displayed

Title: Cart Calculations - Shipping
Preconditions: Items in cart, shipping method selected
Steps:
1. Select shipping method
2. Verify shipping cost displays
3. Verify added to total
Expected Result:
- Shipping cost shown
- Matches selected method
- Included in total

Title: Checkout - Delivery Option Selection
Preconditions: Products in cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Locate shipping options
3. Select 'Delivery' option
4. Verify shipping form appears
Expected Result:
- Delivery option selectable
- Address form displays
- Shipping methods available

Title: Checkout - Enter Shipping Address
Preconditions: Delivery selected, no saved addresses
Steps:
1. Fill address form:
   - Street, City, State, ZIP, Country
2. Verify validation
3. Save address
Expected Result:
- All fields accept input
- Validation works
- Address saved

Title: Checkout - Select Saved Address
Preconditions: User has saved addresses
Steps:
1. Select Delivery option
2. View saved addresses dropdown
3. Select existing address
4. Verify populated
Expected Result:
- Saved addresses listed
- Selection populates fields
- Can edit if needed

Title: Checkout - Address Validation
Preconditions: Address form open
Steps:
1. Enter incomplete address
2. Try to proceed
3. Verify validation errors
4. Fix errors and proceed
Expected Result:
- Required fields enforced
- Format validation works
- Clear error messages

Title: Checkout - Shipping Method Selection
Preconditions: Valid address entered
Steps:
1. View shipping methods
2. Select Ground shipping
3. Verify cost displays
4. Select Air shipping
5. Verify cost updates
Expected Result:
- Methods listed with costs
- Selection updates total
- Delivery estimates shown

Title: Checkout - Payment Method Selection
Preconditions: Shipping configured
Steps:
1. View payment methods
2. Select credit card option
3. Verify payment form displays
Expected Result:
- Payment methods listed
- Selection shows form
- Required fields indicated

Title: Checkout - Order Review
Preconditions: All checkout steps complete
Steps:
1. View order summary
2. Verify line items
3. Verify shipping address
4. Verify payment method
5. Verify totals
Expected Result:
- All info correct
- Can edit each section
- Place Order button active

Title: Checkout - Place Order
Preconditions: All checkout info valid
Steps:
1. Review order details
2. Click 'Place Order'
3. Wait for processing
4. Verify confirmation
Expected Result:
- Order submitted
- Processing indicator shown
- Confirmation page displays

Title: Checkout - Order Confirmation Page
Preconditions: Order just placed
Steps:
1. View confirmation page
2. Verify order number
3. Verify order details
4. Verify email mention
Expected Result:
- Order number displayed
- All items listed
- Totals shown
- Email confirmation sent

Title: Order History - View Orders
Preconditions: User has previous orders
Steps:
1. Navigate to account
2. Click Order History
3. Verify orders list
Expected Result:
- Orders displayed
- Most recent first
- Status shown for each

Title: Order History - View Details
Preconditions: Orders exist in history
Steps:
1. Click on an order
2. View order detail page
3. Verify all information
Expected Result:
- Line items shown
- Shipping info displayed
- Payment info shown
- Status timeline visible

Title: Order - Pickup Details Display
Preconditions: Pickup order in history
Steps:
1. View pickup order details
2. Verify pickup location
3. Verify pickup instructions
Expected Result:
- Pickup location name/address
- Store hours shown
- Pickup instructions clear

Title: Order - Delivery Details Display
Preconditions: Delivery order in history
Steps:
1. View delivery order details
2. Verify shipping address
3. Verify tracking (if available)
Expected Result:
- Shipping address correct
- Carrier shown
- Tracking link (when shipped)

Title: Guest Checkout - Happy Path
Preconditions: Store allows anonymous users (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), products available in catalog
Steps:
1. Open storefront in a private/incognito window (not logged in)
2. Navigate to a product detail page
3. Click Add to Cart
4. Navigate to cart and click Checkout
5. Enter guest email address
6. Fill in shipping address fields (first name, last name, address, city, state, ZIP, country)
7. Select a shipping method
8. Enter payment details
9. Click Place Order
10. Verify order confirmation page
Expected Result:
- Guest user can reach checkout without registering
- Email field appears at checkout start
- Shipping form accepts all required fields
- Shipping methods are listed and selectable
- Payment form accepts input
- Order confirmation page displays with order number
- Cart is cleared after successful order
- Confirmation email sent to entered guest email

Title: Guest Checkout - New Address Entry
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout (no saved addresses)
Steps:
1. Proceed to checkout as guest
2. Verify no saved addresses are shown or auto-populated
3. Manually fill all address fields: first name, last name, street address, city, state/province, ZIP/postal code, country, phone number
4. Proceed to shipping method selection
5. Verify address is used
Expected Result:
- No pre-populated address fields for guest users
- All required address fields accept input
- Field validation passes for valid data
- Address is carried through to order summary
- Shipping methods calculate based on entered address

Title: Guest Checkout - Track Order
Preconditions: Guest order successfully placed
Steps:
1. Note the order number from guest checkout confirmation page
2. Note the email address used during guest checkout
3. Navigate to the order tracking page (e.g., /account/orders/track or similar)
4. Enter the guest email address
5. Enter the order number
6. Submit the tracking form
7. Verify order status is displayed
Expected Result:
- Order tracking page is accessible without login
- Form accepts email and order number inputs
- Correct order details are returned for valid email+order number combination
- Order status is clearly displayed
- Incorrect combinations show appropriate error message

Title: Guest Checkout - Prompt Registration After Purchase
Preconditions: Guest order just placed, on confirmation page
Steps:
1. Complete a guest checkout and land on the order confirmation page
2. Look for a 'Create Account' or 'Register' prompt on the confirmation page
3. Verify the prompt mentions linking the order to the new account
4. Click the Create Account call-to-action
5. Complete registration with the same email used for guest checkout
Expected Result:
- Confirmation page displays a 'Create Account' prompt
- Prompt text references linking the current order to the new account
- Registration form pre-fills the email from the guest checkout
- After registration, the guest order appears in the new account's order history

Title: Guest Checkout - With Coupon Code
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout, valid coupon code exists in system
Steps:
1. Proceed to checkout as guest (not logged in)
2. Enter guest email address
3. Fill shipping address
4. Select shipping method
5. Locate coupon code input field on cart or checkout page
6. Enter a valid coupon code
7. Click Apply
8. Verify discount is applied to order total
9. Complete checkout
Expected Result:
- Coupon code field is accessible to guest users
- Valid coupon is accepted and discount applied
- Order summary reflects the discounted total
- Discount is preserved through to the order confirmation
- Order confirmation shows the coupon discount line item

Title: Guest Checkout - Field Validation
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout step
Steps:
1. Attempt to proceed past email step without entering an email
2. Verify error message for empty email
3. Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'notanemail')
4. Attempt to proceed and verify format validation error
5. Enter a valid email and proceed
6. Leave required address fields empty and attempt to proceed
7. Verify inline error messages per field
8. Fix all errors with valid data and proceed
Expected Result:
- Empty email field shows 'Email is required' or equivalent error
- Invalid email format shows 'Enter a valid email address' error
- Required address fields show individual inline errors when empty
- Errors appear inline next to the relevant field
- After fixing all errors, form proceeds normally

Title: Guest Checkout - Register After Purchase and Order Linked
Preconditions: Guest order placed, on confirmation page
Steps:
1. Complete a guest checkout
2. On the confirmation page, click 'Create Account'
3. Complete the registration form using the same email address as the guest order
4. Submit the registration
5. Navigate to account order history
Expected Result:
- Registration completes successfully
- New account is created with the guest email
- Order placed as guest is now visible in the new account's order history
- Order details match the original guest order (items, totals, address)

Title: Guest Checkout - Disabled When Anonymous Users Not Allowed
Preconditions: Store configured with anonymousUsersAllowed: false
Steps:
1. Open storefront in an incognito/private window (not logged in)
2. Navigate to a product detail page
3. Click Add to Cart
4. Attempt to navigate to checkout
Expected Result:
- Guest checkout is not available
- User is redirected to the sign-in page when attempting to checkout
- Sign-in page displays a prompt to log in or register
- Cart contents are preserved for after login

Title: Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign In
Preconditions: User has an account, at least one product available
Steps:
1. Log in to the storefront
2. Add two or more products to the cart
3. Note the items and quantities in the cart
4. Sign out of the account
5. Sign back in with the same credentials
6. Navigate to the cart
Expected Result:
- After signing back in, the same items are present in the cart
- Quantities match what was added before sign-out
- Cart total is correct

Title: Cart Persistence - Price Updates While Signed Out
Preconditions: User has an account, admin access available, product in cart
Steps:
1. Log in and add a product to the cart
2. Note the current price of the product
3. Sign out of the storefront
4. In Admin, navigate to the product and update its price
5. Sign back in to the storefront
6. Navigate to the cart
Expected Result:
- Cart still contains the product after sign-in
- The cart now displays the updated (current) price for the product
- Line total and cart total reflect the new price
- No stale cached price is shown

Title: Cart Persistence - Cross-Device (Cross-Session)
Preconditions: User has an account, can open two separate browser sessions or devices
Steps:
1. Log in to the storefront in Browser Session A
2. Add two or more products to the cart
3. Open a new browser session (e.g., different browser or incognito after sign-in) — Browser Session B
4. Log in with the same account credentials
5. Navigate to the cart in Browser Session B
Expected Result:
- Cart in Session B contains the same items added in Session A
- Quantities and selected variants match
- Cart is synchronized via server-side session/account, not just local storage

Title: Cart Persistence - Guest Cart Merge on Sign In
Preconditions: Store allows guest shopping, user has an account
Steps:
1. Open the storefront without logging in (guest)
2. Add one or more products to the cart as a guest
3. Navigate to sign in
4. Sign in with an existing account that already has items in the cart
5. Navigate to the cart after sign-in
Expected Result:
- Guest cart items are merged with the existing account cart
- No items are silently dropped
- If the same product exists in both carts, quantities are combined or handled per configured merge strategy
- User sees a combined cart with all items

Title: Cart Validation - Out of Stock After Add
Preconditions: Product is in cart, admin access to change inventory
Steps:
1. Add a product to the cart
2. In Admin, set the product's inventory to 0 (out of stock)
3. Return to the storefront cart page (or refresh)
4. Observe cart item state
5. Attempt to proceed to checkout
Expected Result:
- Cart displays a warning or error on the out-of-stock item
- Item is visually flagged (e.g., 'Out of Stock' label or warning banner)
- Checkout button is blocked/disabled until the out-of-stock item is removed
- User is given an option to remove the unavailable item

Title: Cart Validation - Price Change After Add
Preconditions: Product is in cart, admin access to change pricing
Steps:
1. Add a product to the cart and note its price
2. In Admin, update the product's price to a higher value
3. Return to the storefront and refresh the cart page
4. Observe the cart item price
Expected Result:
- Cart displays the current (updated) price for the item
- Price change is reflected in both the line total and cart total
- If the platform shows a price-change notification, it appears
- User must acknowledge the change before proceeding (if configured)

Title: Cart Validation - Product Unpublished After Add
Preconditions: Product is in cart, admin access to unpublish product
Steps:
1. Add a product to the cart
2. In Admin, unpublish or deactivate the product from the catalog
3. Return to the storefront and refresh the cart page
4. Attempt to proceed to checkout
Expected Result:
- Cart shows the product as unavailable (e.g., 'This item is no longer available')
- Checkout is blocked until the unavailable item is removed
- User is prompted to remove the item
- Removing the item unblocks the checkout flow

Title: Cart Validation - Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
Preconditions: Product in cart with limited stock, inventory tracking enabled
Steps:
1. Add a product to the cart with quantity 1
2. Update the quantity to a value exceeding the available stock (e.g., if 5 available, enter 10)
3. Apply or save the quantity change
4. Observe cart validation behavior
5. Attempt to proceed to checkout
Expected Result:
- Cart shows a warning that requested quantity exceeds available stock
- Quantity is either auto-corrected to the maximum available or checkout is blocked
- Warning message clearly states the maximum available quantity
- User can adjust quantity to the allowed maximum and proceed normally

Title: Cart Validation - Mixed Valid and Invalid Items
Preconditions: Multiple products in cart, admin access to make some unavailable
Steps:
1. Add three or more products to the cart
2. In Admin, make one product out of stock and unpublish another product
3. Return to the storefront cart page and refresh
4. Observe how the cart handles mixed valid/invalid items
5. Remove invalid items
6. Attempt to proceed to checkout
Expected Result:
- Valid items remain in the cart with correct prices and quantities
- Invalid items are clearly flagged with individual status messages (out of stock, unavailable)
- A summary warning banner explains that some items need attention
- Checkout is blocked until all invalid items are resolved
- After removing all invalid items, checkout proceeds normally

Title: Order Status - New
Preconditions: Order just placed by logged-in user
Steps:
1. Place an order through the storefront
2. Navigate to account order history
3. Click on the newly placed order
4. View the order status
Expected Result:
- Order status displays as 'New' immediately after placement
- Status is visible on the order detail page
- Status label matches the platform's configured display text for the New status

Title: Order Status - Processing
Preconditions: Order in 'New' status, admin access available
Steps:
1. Note an order in 'New' status in the storefront order history
2. In Admin, navigate to the order
3. Update the order status to 'Processing'
4. Return to the storefront
5. Refresh the order detail page
Expected Result:
- Order status on the storefront updates to 'Processing' (or equivalent)
- Status change is reflected without requiring a new login
- Order status history/timeline shows the transition from New to Processing

Title: Order Status - Shipped with Tracking Number
Preconditions: Order in 'Processing' status, admin access available
Steps:
1. In Admin, update the order to 'Shipped' status
2. Add a tracking number and carrier name to the shipment
3. Navigate to the storefront order detail page and refresh
Expected Result:
- Order status displays as 'Shipped'
- Tracking number is visible on the order detail page
- Carrier name is displayed alongside the tracking number
- Tracking link (if configured) is clickable and opens the carrier tracking page

Title: Order Status - Completed
Preconditions: Order in 'Shipped' status, admin access available
Steps:
1. In Admin, update the order status to 'Completed'
2. Navigate to the storefront order detail page and refresh
Expected Result:
- Order status displays as 'Completed'
- No actions like 'Cancel' are available for a completed order
- Order history reflects the completed status
- Any configured post-completion actions (e.g., review prompt) appear if applicable

Title: Checkout Validation - Empty Required Fields
Preconditions: User at checkout shipping address step
Steps:
1. Navigate to the checkout shipping step
2. Leave all address fields empty
3. Attempt to proceed to the next checkout step by clicking Continue or Next
4. Observe validation behavior
Expected Result:
- Inline validation errors appear next to each required empty field
- Error messages clearly identify which field is missing (e.g., 'First name is required')
- The form does not advance to the next step
- All required fields are highlighted or marked with an error state

Title: Checkout Validation - Invalid ZIP/Postal Code
Preconditions: User at checkout shipping address step, address fields partially filled
Steps:
1. Fill in all address fields with valid data
2. Replace the ZIP/postal code with an invalid value (e.g., 'ABCDE' for a US address or '123' for a country requiring more digits)
3. Attempt to proceed to the next step
Expected Result:
- Validation error appears on the ZIP/postal code field
- Error message indicates the format is invalid for the selected country
- Form does not advance until ZIP is corrected
- After entering a valid ZIP, validation clears and form proceeds

Title: Checkout Validation - Invalid Phone Number
Preconditions: User at checkout shipping address step
Steps:
1. Fill in all required address fields with valid data
2. Enter an invalid phone number (e.g., '123', '(abc) def-ghij', or a number that is too short)
3. Attempt to proceed to the next step
Expected Result:
- Validation error appears on the phone number field
- Error message indicates the phone number format is invalid
- Form does not advance until a valid phone number is entered
- After entering a valid phone number, validation clears

Title: Checkout Validation - Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: Guest user at email entry step, or registered user editing contact email at checkout
Steps:
1. In the email field at checkout, enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'user@', 'notanemail', 'user@domain')
2. Attempt to proceed to the next step
Expected Result:
- Validation error appears on the email field immediately or on submit
- Error message indicates the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Enter a valid email address')
- Form does not advance with an invalid email
- After correcting to a valid email format, the error clears

Title: Checkout Validation - Fix Errors and Proceed
Preconditions: User at checkout with validation errors present on address form
Steps:
1. Trigger validation errors by attempting to proceed with empty or invalid fields
2. Fix each validation error by entering valid data in each highlighted field
3. Ensure all error states clear as each field is corrected
4. Click Continue/Next once all fields are valid
Expected Result:
- Validation error messages disappear as each field is corrected with valid input
- All error states are cleared before proceeding
- Form successfully advances to the next checkout step after all errors are resolved
- No residual error states remain on the corrected fields

Title: B2B Checkout - PO Number Entry
Preconditions: Logged in as B2B organization user, cart has items
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart and proceed to checkout
2. On the checkout page, locate the PO Number field (visible for organization users)
3. Enter a valid PO number (e.g., 'PO-2026-001')
4. Complete the remaining checkout steps (shipping, payment)
5. Place the order
6. Verify the PO number on the order confirmation page
Expected Result:
- PO Number field is visible for B2B/organization users
- Field accepts alphanumeric PO number input
- PO number is displayed on the order confirmation page
- PO number appears on the order detail page in account order history
- PO number is stored with the order in Admin

Title: B2B Checkout - Net 30 Payment Terms
Preconditions: Logged in as B2B org user with Net 30 terms configured for the organization
Steps:
1. Navigate to checkout with items in cart
2. Proceed to payment method selection
3. Verify 'Net 30' or equivalent payment terms option is available
4. Select Net 30 as the payment method
5. Place the order
6. Verify order status
Expected Result:
- Net 30 payment terms option is displayed at checkout for eligible org users
- Selecting Net 30 does not require credit card entry
- Order is placed with status 'Pending Approval' or 'On Account' per configured workflow
- Order appears in admin with Net 30 payment method recorded

Title: B2B Checkout - Approval Workflow
Preconditions: B2B org with approval workflow enabled, Buyer and Admin roles available
Steps:
1. Log in as a Buyer user (role with purchase limit requiring approval)
2. Add items to cart that exceed the buyer's purchase limit
3. Proceed through checkout and place the order
4. Note the order status
5. Log in as an Admin/Approver
6. Navigate to the pending order in Admin
7. Approve the order
8. Return to storefront as the Buyer and check order status
Expected Result:
- Order is placed with status 'Pending Approval'
- Buyer receives a notification that the order requires approval
- Admin sees the order in the approval queue
- After Admin approves, order status changes to 'Processing'
- Buyer sees updated status in their order history

Title: B2B Checkout - Buyer Cannot Bypass Approval
Preconditions: B2B org with approval workflow enabled, logged in as Buyer
Steps:
1. Log in as a Buyer user subject to approval workflow
2. Add items to cart that exceed the purchase limit requiring approval
3. Attempt to manipulate checkout to bypass the approval step (e.g., directly submitting API requests, modifying UI elements)
4. Observe system behavior
Expected Result:
- Approval requirement is enforced server-side, not only on the frontend
- Any attempt to bypass the approval step fails
- Order cannot transition to 'Processing' without proper approval
- System logs or flags any suspicious bypass attempts if applicable

Title: B2B Checkout - Organization Shipping Address
Preconditions: Logged in as B2B org user, organization has a configured shipping address
Steps:
1. Log in as a B2B organization user
2. Add items to cart and proceed to checkout
3. Observe the shipping address options
4. Verify organization-specific addresses are listed separately from personal addresses
Expected Result:
- Organization shipping addresses are displayed as a distinct group or clearly labeled
- The org address can be selected as the shipping destination
- Personal addresses are available but clearly differentiated
- Selected org address is carried through to the order confirmation

Title: B2B Checkout - Contract Pricing Applied
Preconditions: B2B org with contract/tier pricing configured, products with org-specific prices
Steps:
1. Log in as a B2B organization user with configured contract pricing
2. Navigate to a product that has org-specific contract pricing
3. Verify the contract price is displayed on the product page
4. Add the product to cart
5. Proceed through checkout
6. Verify the price in the cart and at checkout
Expected Result:
- Contract/negotiated price is shown on the product detail page (not the standard catalog price)
- Cart line item shows the contract price
- Order summary at checkout reflects contract pricing
- Placed order uses contract pricing, not standard catalog pricing
- Price difference from catalog price is correctly reflected in totals

Title: B2B Checkout - Coupon on Top of Contract Price
Preconditions: B2B org user with contract pricing, valid coupon applicable to the product
Steps:
1. Log in as a B2B org user
2. Add a product with contract pricing to the cart
3. Apply a valid coupon code at checkout
4. Verify the discount calculation
5. Place the order
Expected Result:
- Coupon is accepted for B2B users
- Discount is calculated on top of the contract price (or per the configured discount stacking rules)
- Cart total correctly reflects: contract price minus coupon discount
- Order confirmation and admin order detail show the coupon discount as a separate line item
- No double-discounting occurs

Title: B2B Checkout - PO Number Validation
Preconditions: Logged in as B2B org user, at checkout with PO Number field visible
Steps:
1. Leave the PO Number field empty if it is a required field, then attempt to place the order
2. Verify the required field validation error
3. Enter a PO number that exceeds the maximum allowed character length
4. Verify the length validation error
5. Enter a valid PO number within the allowed length
6. Verify the error clears and checkout proceeds
Expected Result:
- If PO Number is required, an error appears when the field is empty: 'PO Number is required'
- If a maximum character limit exists, entering a too-long value shows a validation error
- Validation errors appear inline next to the PO Number field
- Valid PO number clears all errors and allows order placement

Title: Create RFQ from Cart
Preconditions: User logged in as B2B buyer, items in cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart with at least 2 items
2. Locate and click the 'Request Quote' button
3. Verify RFQ form displays with line items pre-populated
4. Fill in specifications or notes field
5. Submit the RFQ
6. Verify confirmation message
7. Verify quote status is 'Processing'
Expected Result:
- 'Request Quote' button visible in cart for B2B users

Title: Effective Min Quantity = max(minQuantity packSize) - UI Reflects Correct Value

Title: Pack Size Product With Sufficient Stock - Add to Cart in Pack Increments

Title: Multi-FFC Stock Aggregation vs Pack Size Threshold

ID: - Customer informed that promotion is no longer valid (if applicable)"
Title: Coverage Gap Analysis
Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign Back In
Preconditions: User logged in with items in cart
Steps:
1. Log in to storefront account
2. Add 2-3 different products to cart with varying quantities
3. Note all cart contents (products, quantities, prices)
4. Sign out of the account
5. Verify cart is cleared or inaccessible on storefront
6. Sign back in with the same account
7. Navigate to cart page
8. Compare cart contents with noted items
Expected Result:
- Cart contents are fully preserved after sign out/in cycle
- All product names, quantities, and prices match pre-sign-out state
- Cart count badge shows correct total
- Cart subtotal matches pre-sign-out value
- No duplicate items or missing items

Title: Cart Merge - Guest to Authenticated User
Preconditions: Registered account with existing items in cart (e.g. Product A qty 2); user currently signed out
Steps:
1. As a guest (not signed in), add Product B to cart (qty 1)
2. Add Product C to cart (qty 3)
3. Verify guest cart shows Products B and C
4. Sign in with the registered account (which already has Product A qty 2)
5. Navigate to cart page
6. Verify all items are present (Products A, B, and C)
7. Verify quantities are correct (A=2, B=1, C=3)
8. Verify no duplicate entries for any product
Expected Result:
- Guest cart items merge with existing account cart
- All items from both carts are present after login
- Quantities from guest session are preserved
- Pre-existing account cart items retain their quantities
- Cart subtotal reflects combined items
- No data loss from either cart source

Title: Cart Persistence - Coupon Survives Sign Out/In
Preconditions: User logged in, valid coupon code available, products in cart eligible for coupon
Steps:
1. Log in and add eligible products to cart
2. Apply a valid coupon code on the cart page
3. Verify coupon is applied and discount is reflected in cart total
4. Note the discount amount and final total
5. Sign out of the account
6. Sign back in with the same account
7. Navigate to cart page
8. Verify coupon is still applied
9. Verify discount amount matches pre-sign-out value
Expected Result:
- Coupon code persists across sign out/in cycle
- Discount amount is identical after re-authentication
- Cart total with discount matches pre-sign-out total
- Coupon code is visible in cart summary
- No need to re-enter the coupon code manually

Title: Price Change During Session - Admin Increases Price
Preconditions: User logged in with item in cart at known price (e.g. $10.00), admin access available
Steps:
1. Add a product to cart and note the displayed unit price ($10.00)
2. Note the cart subtotal
3. In Admin SPA, navigate to Catalog > Products > find the same product
4. Update the product price to $15.00 and save
5. Return to the storefront cart page
6. Refresh the page (F5)
7. Verify the displayed unit price for the line item
8. Verify the cart subtotal has recalculated
Expected Result:
- Cart line item price updates to $15.00 after refresh
- Cart subtotal recalculates based on new price
- Price change is reflected without requiring item removal and re-add
- No stale cached price shown after refresh
- Cart remains functional (can proceed to checkout at new price)

Title: Price Change During Session - Price Drop With Indicator
Preconditions: User logged in with item in cart at known price, admin access available
Steps:
1. Add a product to cart and note the price (e.g. $25.00)
2. In Admin SPA, decrease the product price to $18.00
3. Return to the storefront cart page
4. Refresh the page
5. Observe the price display for the line item
6. Check for any price-change notification or indicator
7. Verify the cart subtotal reflects the new price
Expected Result:
- Cart shows the updated lower price ($18.00)
- A visual indicator or notification informs the user that the price has changed (e.g. Price updated badge, strikethrough of old price, or toast notification)
- Cart subtotal recalculates automatically
- Customer benefits from the lower price
- No confusion: old price is not prominently displayed without context

Title: Item Goes Out of Stock While in Cart
Preconditions: User logged in with item in cart, admin access to adjust inventory
Steps:
1. Add a product to cart (qty 1) and verify it appears in cart
2. In Admin SPA, set the product inventory to 0 (out of stock)
3. Wait for search index to update (30-60 seconds)
4. Return to the storefront cart page
5. Refresh the page
6. Observe the status of the out-of-stock item in cart
7. Attempt to click Proceed to Checkout
Expected Result:
- Out-of-stock item is visually marked as unavailable in cart (grayed out, strikethrough, or badge)
- Cart shows a clear message indicating the item is unavailable
- Proceed to Checkout button is disabled or blocked with an error
- User is prompted to remove the unavailable item before checkout
- Other in-stock items in cart remain unaffected

Title: Checkout Blocked by Out-of-Stock Item
Preconditions: User logged in, cart contains one out-of-stock item and one in-stock item
Steps:

6. Click Proceed to Checkout again
Expected Result:
- Checkout is blocked when cart contains out-of-stock items
- Clear error message indicates which item(s) are unavailable
- After removing unavailable item, checkout proceeds normally
- In-stock items are not affected by the validation block
- Error message is user-friendly and actionable

Title: Cart Item Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
Preconditions: User logged in, product in cart, product has limited stock (e.g. 3 units)
Steps:

Expected Result:
- Validation error is displayed when quantity exceeds stock
- Quantity is either capped at maximum available or an error message is shown
- Error message clearly states the available stock limit
- Cannot proceed to checkout with quantity exceeding stock
- Cart subtotal reflects the valid (capped) quantity

Title: Cart With Zero-Quantity Item Cannot Proceed to Checkout
Preconditions: User logged in, product in cart
Steps:

Title: Checkout - Invalid Billing Zip Code Validation
Preconditions: User at checkout with Billing same as shipping unchecked, billing form visible

8. Proceed with order placement
Expected Result:

- Shipping address is not affected by billing validation error

- No data loss in other fields when fixing the error
- Validation distinguishes between shipping and billing field errors

Title: Checkout - All Shipping Fields Empty Validation
Preconditions: User logged in, product in cart, at checkout shipping step (no saved addresses or adding new address)
Steps:

6. Verify each required field has an individual error indicator
Expected Result:

- Required fields include: first name, last name, address line 1, city, state/province, ZIP/postal code, country, phone
- Each field shows its own error message (not just a single generic error)
- Form does not advance to next step with empty fields
- Focus moves to first invalid field (or errors are clearly visible)
- No server-side error or page crash from empty submission

Title: Checkout - Invalid Phone Format Validation

- Error message indicates the phone field specifically

- Other valid field values are preserved during correction
- No server-side error from malformed phone input

Title: Checkout - Invalid ZIP/Postal Code Validation
Preconditions: User at checkout shipping step
Steps:

Title: Checkout - Validation Error Recovery
Preconditions: User at checkout with multiple validation errors showing
Steps:

8. Verify checkout proceeds to next step
Expected Result:

- Fixing individual fields clears their respective error messages
- No new spurious errors appear while fixing existing ones
- After all errors are fixed, form submits successfully
- Checkout proceeds to the next step normally
- Previously valid fields retain their values throughout the correction process

Title: Reorder - All Items Added to Cart at Current Prices
Preconditions: User logged in with at least one completed order in order history, all ordered items still available
Steps:

2. Find a completed order with multiple items
3. Note the original order prices and quantities
4. Click Reorder button on the order
5. Verify redirect to cart page
6. Compare cart items with original order items
7. Verify quantities match original order
8. Check that prices reflect current catalog prices (not historical order prices)

- Quantities match the original order
- Prices reflect current catalog prices, not the historical order price
- Cart subtotal is calculated using current prices
- If current prices differ from original order, the new prices are shown

Title: Reorder - Discontinued Item Handled Gracefully
Preconditions: User logged in with completed order containing at least one discontinued/unavailable product and one available product
Steps:

2. Find an order that includes a now-discontinued product
3. Click Reorder button
4. Observe the cart page after reorder

6. Verify available items are still added to cart
Expected Result:

- Warning message clearly identifies which item(s) could not be added
- Warning specifies the reason (e.g. Product X is no longer available)
- Cart is still functional with the available items
- User is not blocked from proceeding with available items only

Title: Reorder - Quantities Match Original Order
Preconditions: User logged in with completed order containing items with various quantities (e.g. Product A qty 2, Product B qty 5)

2. Open order detail for the target order
3. Note quantities for each line item (e.g. A=2, B=5)
4. Click Reorder
5. Navigate to cart page
6. Verify quantity for each item matches original order

- Product B quantity in cart = 5 (matches original order)
- All line item quantities exactly match original order quantities
- No items are added with default quantity of 1 instead of original quantity
- Cart subtotal reflects correct quantities x current prices

Title: Order Status - New Order Shows Correct Status

Title: Order Status - Admin Ships Order With Tracking
